calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-10-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Hilary Lamar for and with (executor) Wade Hughan.

The court stated that there are issues regarding the request for extraordinary fees/services of the executor and extraordinary fees of the attorney. Mr. Hughan reported that his services were provided in good faith and at the request of the beneficiaries, that it took a tremendous amount of effort and work with regard to the property in France, that abandoning the property in France was not an option as the taxes would still have to be paid, that the taxes in France were $100,000 Euro which was paid out of the sale, and that it was difficult finding the right people in France to counsel him and to be assured that the process was being done correctly. Ms. Lamar reported that they had to close the France estate prior to completing the California estate and explained the reasons for the 1st and 2nd distributions. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
